name: Cornbread Broccoli Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 28 oz can whole tomatoes, juice reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Adapt the cornbread recipe from a Gourmet recipe. Any cornbread recipe can be used.
2. Saute onions in a large skillet over medium-low heat until softened.
3. Add mushrooms and cook until liquid released has evaporated.
4. Add garlic and stir frequently for 2 minutes.
5. Add broccoli, chopped tomatoes (excluding juice), reserved tomato juice, Madeira wine, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes.
6. Make the cornbread batter according to your chosen recipe.
7. Transfer vegetables to an 8 1/2" x 11" baking dish. Cook the liquid in the skillet until reduced to about 3/4 cup, then pour over the vegetables.
8. Spread the cornbread batter evenly over the vegetables and bake for 30 minutes at 400°F (200°C).
